description: Performs structured sequential thinking to analyze and plan any biomedical research task. Required as the first step before searches or data fetches.

thought.description: The analytic step or thought process

nextThoughtNeeded.description: Whether further thought steps are needed

returns.description: Stepwise reasoning and research planning

description: Unified cross-domain biomedical search for articles, trials, variants, genes, drugs, and diseases. Supports complex field-based queries and domain filters.

query.description: Field-based query or unified search string

domain.description: Domain to search (e.g., article, trial, variant, gene, drug, disease, NCI/FDA domains)

returns.description: Results with record IDs, titles, snippets, and links for each domain.

description: Fetches detailed information for a specific biomedical record by its unique ID, covering all supported domains: articles, trials, genes, variants, drugs, diseases, NCI, FDA.

id.description: Record identifier (PMID, NCT ID, rsID, HGVS, symbol, drug/disease name, etc.)

domain.description: Data domain (optional — auto-detects from ID if not provided)

detail.description: Extra detail level for certain domains (e.g., clinical trials)

returns.description: Full metadata, comprehensive text/content, and link to resource.

description: Searches biomedical literature (PubMed, preprints) for articles relating to specified genes, variants, diseases, or chemicals.

returns.description: Matched articles: title, snippet, source URL.

description: Fetches the full abstract and available text of a biomedical article by PMID, PMC ID, or DOI.

returns.description: Article metadata, abstract, full text if available.

description: Searches ClinicalTrials.gov for clinical studies per condition, intervention, phase, location, recruiting status, and more filters.

returns.description: Matching clinical trial summaries with key info and NCT ID links.

description: Fetches all available details for a clinical trial by its NCT ID.

returns.description: Full protocol, locations, outcomes/results, and references.

description: Fetches the core protocol information for a clinical trial by NCT ID.

returns.description: Protocol summary and basic trial design details.

description: Fetches all linked publications and references for a clinical trial (by NCT ID).

returns.description: List of publications with IDs and basic info.

description: Fetches outcome measures and results data for a clinical trial (by NCT ID).

returns.description: Primary and secondary outcomes, posted results if available.

description: Fetches contact and study site information for a clinical trial (by NCT ID).

returns.description: Addresses, principal investigator, recruitment status by location.

description: Searches MyVariant.info for genetic variant database records, filtering by gene, rsID, HGVS notation, predicted consequence, frequencies, clinical significance, and more.

returns.description: List of matching variant records with basic annotation and metadata.

description: Fetches complete annotation and external data for a specific genetic variant (HGVS, rsID, etc.).

variant_id.description: Variant ID: HGVS, rsID, or MyVariant-style

returns.description: Full variant annotations: location, effects, frequencies, clinical/functional significance, external links.

description: Predicts gene regulatory effects of genetic variants using DeepMind AlphaGenome (with valid API key).

returns.description: Predicted impact on gene expression, chromatin, splicing, etc.

description: Fetches detailed gene annotations from MyGene.info for a gene symbol or Entrez ID.

returns.description: Gene name, description, type, external links, aliases.

description: Fetches comprehensive drug/chemical information from MyChem.info.

returns.description: Chemical properties, mechanism, indications, external links.

description: Fetches comprehensive disease information from MyDisease.info.

returns.description: Definition, synonyms, ontology mapping, phenotypes, database links.

description: Searches for organizations (cancer centers, hospitals, sponsors) in NCI's clinical trials database. Needs NCI API key.

returns.description: Matching organization summaries with location and type.

description: Fetches full details for a specific NCI organization (cancer center, hospital, sponsor, etc.), requires NCI API key.

returns.description: Detailed record—contact info, research focus, associated trials.

description: Searches for interventions in NCI clinical trials: drugs, devices, procedures, etc. Needs NCI API key.

returns.description: Matching intervention records.

description: Fetches detailed information about an NCI intervention (drug, device, etc.), requires NCI API key.

returns.description: Full intervention details, trials, combinations, mechanism.

description: Searches for biomarkers used in NCI trial eligibility (gene mutations, protein expression, etc.), requires API key.

returns.description: Matching biomarker records.

description: Searches NCI's controlled vocabulary for cancer conditions used in trials; returns standardized terms, synonyms, and codes; requires NCI API key.

returns.description: Matching disease terms and their metadata.

description: Queries I Ching hexagram details by hexagram number. Returns Chinese name, Unicode, and full commentary.

returns.description: Hexagram details including name, symbol, judgment, line text, explanations.

description: Performs classic I Ching divination using three coins; optionally input a question. Returns full hexagram and guidance.

returns.description: Primary and changing hexagrams, line details, explanations.

description: Performs bibliomantic consultation with I Ching, given a user query. Returns related hexagram, explanations, guidance.

returns.description: Random hexagram, names, explanations, traditional elements.

description: Fetches current server statistics (operational status, load, etc.).

returns.description: Server status and runtime metrics.

description: Searches FDA Adverse Event Reporting System for drug safety reports—side effects, serious adverse events, etc.

returns.description: List of matching adverse event reports.

description: Gets detailed information for a specific FDA adverse event report.

returns.description: Full report: demographics, drugs, reactions, narrative.

description: Searches FDA drug labels (prescribing information): indications, warnings, dosage, adverse reactions, etc.

returns.description: Matching drug labels.

description: Gets complete FDA drug label information by label set ID.

returns.description: Full prescribing information for the drug.

description: Searches FDA device adverse event (MAUDE) reports for issues with medical and diagnostic devices.

returns.description: Matching device adverse event reports.

description: Gets detailed information for a specific FDA medical device adverse event report.

returns.description: Full device event details.

description: Searches FDA drug approvals: NDA/BLA records, product info, approval status and history.

returns.description: Matching approval records with status and product details.

description: Gets full FDA drug approval details for a specific application number.

returns.description: Full approval record, dosage forms, submission history.

description: Searches FDA drug recall records: recall reason, product identification, classification, firm, and status.

returns.description: Matching recall records.

description: Gets detailed FDA drug recall information for a specific recall number.

returns.description: Full recall details: reason, product, distribution, actions.

description: Searches FDA drug shortage records: status, reason, affected manufacturers, estimated resolution.

returns.description: Matching shortage records.

description: Gets detailed FDA drug shortage info for a specific drug.

returns.description: Full shortage record, timeline, reason, manufacturer info.
